events.text: Edson Álvarez (Mexico) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Saleh Al Shehri (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ali Al Hassan (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Saudi Arabia 0, Mexico 1. Henry Martín (Mexico) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by César Montes with a headed pass   following a corner.
Hassan Tambakti (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Saudi Arabia 0, Mexico 2. Luis Chávez (Mexico) from a free kick with a left footed shot to the top right corner.
Abdullah Madu (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Abdulelah Al Amri (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Saudi Arabia 1, Mexico 2. Salem Al Dawsari (Saudi Arabia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Hattan Bahbri.
Hattan Bahbri (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
